svg.title: Resize Event Pipeline: Terminal Through Ink Into smdu
svg.desc: Left-to-right horizontal pipeline showing a terminal resize event flowing from PTY generation through Node streams, Ink internals (with real function call chains from ink.js, reconciler.js, renderer.js, output.js, log-update.js), Ink client APIs, and smdu response with write-back to terminal.
svg.text: Terminal resize through Ink internals into smdu, with real function call chains from source
ANSI DIFF FRAME WRITTEN BACK TO stdout → TERMINAL DISPLAYS UPDATED LAYOUT

g.text: stdout.write(ANSI diff bytes) → terminal refreshes display
Ink owns all terminal protocol. smdu never writes raw escape sequences.
Source: ink.js, reconciler.js, renderer.js, render-node-to-output.js, output.js, log-update.js
DUAL RESIZE HANDLING: Ink recomputes root Yoga layout. smdu refines per-component row/column budgets independently.

svg.text: Source-verified against: ink/build/ink.js, reconciler.js, renderer.js, render-node-to-output.js, output.js, log-update.js, dom.js, hooks/use-*.js, components/App.js
